'''Orix''' and his fellow [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]], [[Dimogog]], were a pair of leg-breakers who accompanied the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Jubieck (criminal)|Jubieck]] in trying to obtain the head of [[L8O-RC]] from [[Ginder]] the [[Bimm (furred species)/Legends|Bimm]]. Orix started a three-way battle for the head when he tried to make a grab for it.

==Appearances==
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20010419a|text=Head Trip|int=Head Trip}} {{1stm}}
